payload.text:
Create a modern, professional portfolio website for a Product Owner with the following requirements:

DESIGN REQUIREMENTS:
- Clean, modern design with a professional color scheme (use blue/teal accents)
- Fully responsive (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Single-page application with smooth scroll navigation
- Sections: Hero, About, Projects, Skills, Contact

HERO SECTION:
- Name: Masechaba Khoza
- Title: Product Owner
- Tagline: "Driving measurable impact through data-driven product decisions"
- Highlight metrics: "8.8% conversion rates | 60-min refund processing | 6-hour process automation"
- CTA buttons: "View Projects" and "Contact Me"

ABOUT SECTION:
- Brief bio: "Product Owner with 2+ years driving product development in Payments and eCommerce. Specialized in leveraging data insights to optimize user experiences and streamline processes."
- Education: BSc Computer Science & Engineering, University of Cape Town
- Certification: Certified Scrum Product Owner

PROJECTS SECTION (Card-based layout):
Create 4 project cards with this structure for each:

Project 1: "Customer Sign-Up Optimization"
- Company: UCOOK
- Challenge: "Low conversion rate of 1.9% on customer sign-up journey"
- Solution: "Leveraged PostHog analytics to redesign and optimize the sign-up flow"
- Impact: "363% increase in conversion rate (1.9% → 8.8%)"
- Tags: Data Analytics, Conversion Optimization, PostHog, A/B Testing

Project 2: "Real-Time Refund System"
- Company: Ozow
- Challenge: "48-hour refund processing time affecting customer satisfaction"
- Solution: "Led development of real-time refund product"
- Impact: "Reduced refund time from 48 hours to 60 minutes"
- Tags: Payments, Product Strategy, Customer Experience

Project 3: "Automated Recipe Management"
- Company: UCOOK
- Challenge: "Manual recipe management consuming 6 hours weekly"
- Solution: "Designed and launched automated workflow integrating Jira, Notion, and Google Sheets"
- Impact: "Eliminated 6 hours of manual work weekly"
- Tags: Process Automation, Integration, Workflow Optimization

Project 4: "Voucher Issuance Platform"
- Company: Ozow (Graduate Project)
- Challenge: "Need for scalable voucher issuance system"
- Solution: "Developed product requirements and Figma prototypes for voucher API"
- Impact: "Promoted to Junior Product Owner within 6 months"
- Tags: API Design, Figma Prototyping, Product Documentation

SKILLS SECTION:
Display these skills in a grid or tag cloud:
- Product Management: Scrum, Backlog Management, Stakeholder Management
- Analytics: PostHog, Google Analytics 4, BigQuery, Microsoft Clarity
- Tools: Jira, Figma, Notion
- Technical: Python, Java, C#, React.js

CONTACT SECTION:
- Email: masechaba.c.khoza@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/masechabakhoza/
- Location: Cape Town, South Africa
- Contact form (optional)

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- Use modern HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript
- Include smooth scrolling animations
- Add hover effects on project cards
- Use CSS Grid/Flexbox for layout
- Include a fixed navigation bar
- Add Font Awesome or similar for icons
- Ensure accessibility (semantic HTML, ARIA labels)
- Optimize for performance

STYLE PREFERENCES:
- Typography: Modern sans-serif font (like Inter or Poppins from Google Fonts)
- Color scheme: Professional blues/teals with white background
- Spacing: Generous white space, not cluttered
- Cards: Subtle shadows and hover effects

Please generate complete, production-ready code with all HTML, CSS, and JavaScript in separate sections that I can easily copy and deploy.

entries.description: Project metadata containing app name and description.
Main HTML entry point with Google Fonts and Tailwind CSS script.
Application entry point initializing React and rendering the main App component.
Global TypeScript interfaces for project data and application state.
Constants and data for the portfolio including projects and skills.
Responsive navigation component with smooth scrolling.
Interactive project card with hover effects and detailed information.
Main application component containing all sections for the single-page portfolio.

payload.text: Change the Hire Me button text to be "Let's Connect"

entries.description: Changed the "Hire Me" button text to "Let's Connect" in the navigation bar.

payload.text: Replace the photo in the hero section with this:

entries.description: Updated the hero section profile image with the provided headshot and refined the layout for better presentation of the new image.

payload.text: Add a  google analytics certfication to professional profile

To fulfill your request, I will update the "Professional Profile" section within the `About` component to include your Google Analytics certification alongside your education and CSPO credentials.

### Specification
1.  **Update `App.tsx`**: Modify the "About" section's grid to include a third item under the professional milestones.
2.  **Visual Appearance**: I'll use a data-centric icon (like a bar chart) to represent the Google Analytics certification, maintaining the consistent white-card-on-teal-border aesthetic used for Education and CSPO.
3.  **Content**: Add "Google Analytics Certification" from "Google" to the list of accolades.

entries.description: Added Google Analytics certification to the professional profile section in the About section.

payload.text:
I will remove the entire image section from the Hero area and adjust the layout so your professional introduction takes center stage, spanning the full width for a cleaner, more minimalist look.

### Specification
1.  **Modify `App.tsx`**: 
    *   Remove the entire `lg:grid-cols-2` layout in the Hero section.
    *   Center the text content or align it to optimize the single-column view.
    *   Remove the floating "CSPO Certified" badge that was attached to the image.
    *   Ensure the background blobs still provide visual depth without the image presence.

entries.description: Removed the image section from the hero and updated the layout to a focused, centered typography-driven design.
